Catelyn Stark.text: If father never talked about her, you came back a year later with another woman's son.

Ned Stark.text: It's done, your grace. Targaryen's gone.

Ramsay Bolton.text: That one's yours, Snow. I keep hearing stories about you. Bastard.

Ser Jorah Mormont.text: When your brother Regard led his army at a battle to the frighten,

Bran Stark.text: He's the heir to the Iron Throne.

struggle_overlays.speaker: Catelyn Stark
struggle_overlays.text: A child born in secret.

struggle_overlays.speaker: Robert Baratheon
struggle_overlays.text: They threw you in jail to break your spirit!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ned Stark
struggle_overlays.text: Yet your spirit remained unbroken.

struggle_overlays.speaker: Robert Baratheon
struggle_overlays.text: You fought the thugs on the bloody streets!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Robert Baratheon
struggle_overlays.text: You drew your steel and made them crawl!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Catelyn Stark
struggle_overlays.text: They whispered of your struggles in the dark.
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 6 (Catelyn Stark) - Whispered in Dark (True Peak Skipping)

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ned Stark
struggle_overlays.text: But a true leader never yields to fear.
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 7 (Ned Stark) - Leadership wisdom (True Peak Skipping)

struggle_overlays.speaker: Robert Baratheon
struggle_overlays.text: They plot in the shadows, hoping you fail!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Robert Baratheon
struggle_overlays.text: You crushed their armies at the Battle of Mannheim!
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 9 (Robert Baratheon) - Battle of Mannheim (True Peak Skipping)

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ned Stark
struggle_overlays.text: The scars of your battles run deep.
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 10 (Ned Stark) - Scars of Battle (True Peak Skipping)

struggle_overlays.speaker: Daenerys Targaryen
struggle_overlays.text: He died with noble honor.

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ser Jorah Mormont
struggle_overlays.text: But you rose from the ashes of defeat!
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 12 (Ser Jorah Mormont) - Rose from Ashes (Peak Zone)

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ned Stark
struggle_overlays.text: For a father would take a thousand knives to the heart...

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ned Stark
struggle_overlays.text: ...to keep Lean and Elanese safe.

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ser Jorah Mormont
struggle_overlays.text: You quit the greedy lords to build your own destiny.
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 15 (Ser Jorah Mormont) - Quit Greedy Lords

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ser Jorah Mormont
struggle_overlays.text: Fearless, you entered the wild entrepreneurship.

struggle_overlays.speaker: Daenerys Targaryen
struggle_overlays.text: You raised the banner of Rebelz A.I.!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Robert Baratheon
struggle_overlays.text: Show them your sovereign power!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ramsay Bolton
struggle_overlays.text: But you broke up with your crazy baby mama!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ramsay Bolton
struggle_overlays.text: Screaming like a banshee in the dark night!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ramsay Bolton
struggle_overlays.text: But you severed the ties!

struggle_overlays.speaker: Bran Stark
struggle_overlays.text: House Rebelz shall stand for a thousand generations.
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 22 (Bran Stark) - House Rebelz Stand (True Peak Skipping)

struggle_overlays.speaker: Ned Stark
struggle_overlays.text: Rise, Clarence, and claim your crown.
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 23 (Ned Stark) - Rise and Claim Crown (Peak Zone)

struggle_overlays.speaker: Daenerys Targaryen
struggle_overlays.text: All hail Clarence, the King of Mannheim, now and forevermore!
struggle_overlays.desc: Struggle 24 (Daenerys Targaryen) - King of Mannheim (Peak Zone)
